features: Premium Quality and Timeless Design: Crafted from highquality PU leather, this women’s wallet is designed to be soft and smooth. It features goldtone hardware, upgraded fabric lining, a smooth zipper, and reinforced stitching, offering a classic and stylish look that combines elegance with practicality

Multifunctional and Compact Design: Measuring 4.5 x 3.9 x 1.2 inches (11.5 x 11 x 3 cm) and weighing only 0.19 LB (84.5 g), this slim wallet is designed for everyday use. It includes 5 card slots, 1 ID window, 1 bill compartment, and 1 zippered pocket, making it ideal for organizing cash, cards, IDs, and other essentials

Lightweight and TravelFriendly: Designed with a secure button closure and multifold design, this wallet stays compact and tightly closed even when full. Its lightweight and portable size make it easy to carry in your hand, backpack, handbag, or pocket, perfect for shopping, traveling, or daily use

Stylish Cat Pattern Design and Practical Functionality: This wallet features an adorable Cat Pattern, blending fashion with functionality. Its versatile design makes it suitable for work, business trips, dates, or travel, while also being a practical choice for organizing cards and change at home

Thoughtful Gift for Any Occasion: This stylish and practical wallet is a suitable gift choice for girlfriends, wives, daughters, mothers, grandmothers, aunts, or friends. Suitable for birthdays, holidays, anniversaries, or any special occasion, it’s a thoughtful and functional accessory for any woman in your life
